picks.quote: Tyson Fury is far too good for this level of opposition... this will be a real easy fight for him.
These two fights are really just insignificant in terms of their career. They're both going to win. It's easy wins.
I think it's probably a check that Conor Benn's going to write that he cannot cash against Ryan Garcia. I just think he's too good for him.
If I'm picking a winner, I'm going to say I'm going to say Bivol.
